ops.title: format-core: canonical Rust format-selection crate in cc-context
ops.description: Spike gate (wasm size + wazero latency ≤~5ms warm; serde_json unification audit → lean: in-crate ordered duplicate-preserving IR with raw number lexemes). Corpus exported from Go table tests. Crate: IR/decoder (JSON+NDJSON), classifier (thresholds + provenance comments verbatim), encoders (precision-preserving compact JSON, JSONL, prose, markdown, CSV/TSV, TRON w/ fingerprint fix, TOON via toon-format + ported number-safety guard; reject bare ints >2^53), encode_auto 5% tolerance in integer arithmetic. format-wasm adapter built AT RELEASE (blob gitignored, task wasm for local dev, brew --HEAD loss accepted). Flip ccx Convert/Run to wasm, delete Go encoder internals. Plan: two-notes-shimmying-zephyr Phase 2; user decisions locked: release-built wasm (not committed), Prose stays for ccx.

ops.text: corpus green against native crate AND through the wasm boundary in cc-context CI
numeric vectors green: 2^53±1, i64/u64 boundaries, 25+ digit ints, 26+ digit decimals, huge exponents, -0, exponent spellings
ccx format choice-level behavior unchanged (TOON byte drift documented as minor-version change)
go build works after task wasm; release pipeline builds wasm before goreleaser
